title: Refresh and Reload
drDigitalIntro:
Sometimes a page doesn't load right — it looks broken or half-finished.
• Click the ⟳ reload button to fetch a fresh copy.
• It's the first thing to try when a page acts up.
• Let's try it on a page that didn't load.

playgroundTask.goal: Fix a broken page by reloading it

steps.say: Go to recipebox.example — type it and press Enter.
The page didn't load correctly — you can see the broken content. Click the ⟳ Reload button in the toolbar to load a fresh copy.

drDigitalSuccess: The page loaded properly after reloading! When a site looks broken or won't finish loading, the ⟳ reload button is the first thing to try.
drDigitalHint: The ⟳ circular-arrow Reload button is in the toolbar, to the right of the back/forward arrows.
